message:
Improve AI chat response readability and visual hierarchy (#5117)

Add colored left-border accents to headings (purple for h1, blue for h2),
styled bullet/number markers, blockquote callout styling, strong/bold
emphasis treatment, horizontal rule separator, and tighter paragraph
spacing for a more polished and scannable chat experience.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
